procedure.name: Atomic Red Team validation for T1554
procedure.description: Automated emulation procedure for T1554 executed via Invoke-AtomicRedTeam inside the Metatron lab environment.

command: Import-Module '/opt/invoke-atomicredteam/Invoke-AtomicRedTeam.psd1' -ErrorAction Stop; $env:PathToAtomicsFolder='/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics'; try { bash -lc "if command -v apt-get >/dev/null 2>&1; then export DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive; apt-get update -y >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; apt-get install -y inetutils-telnet ldap-utils lsof mlocate smbclient samba-common-bin dnsutils >/dev/null 2>&1 || true; fi; if ! command -v b64encode >/dev/null 2>&1 && command -v base64 >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf '#!/usr/bin/env bash\nbase64 "$@"\n' > /usr/local/bin/b64encode && chmod +x /usr/local/bin/b64encode; fi" } catch { Write-Host '[WARN] dependency bootstrap failed'; }; try { Invoke-AtomicTest T1554 -PathToAtomicsFolder '/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics' -TestNumbers 1 -GetPrereqs -ErrorAction Continue } catch { Write-Host '[WARN] GetPrereqs failed for T1554'; }; Invoke-AtomicTest T1554 -PathToAtomicsFolder '/opt/atomic-red-team/atomics' -TestNumbers 1

sigma.title: Linux Setgid Capability Set on a Binary via Setcap Utility
Linux Setuid Capability Set on a Binary via Setcap Utility

osquery.name: t1554_crontab
osquery.query_text: SELECT event, minute, hour, day_of_month, month, day_of_week, command, path FROM crontab;

osquery.name: t1554_startup
osquery.query_text: SELECT name, path, source, status, type FROM startup_items;

sigma_matches.title: Linux Setgid Capability Set on a Binary via Setcap Utility
Linux Setuid Capability Set on a Binary via Setcap Utility

executions.reason: Materialized real SOAR execution for persisted MITRE evidence
Materialized real SOAR execution for persisted MITRE evidence

story.narrative: Execution, telemetry, detections, artifacts, network observations, and SOAR response are tracked as separate witnesses and tied together through shared anchors.

promotion.reason: Full S5 validation (Linux Docker sandbox): 11 direct run(s), 5/5 Sigma rules matched with event linkage, 0 osquery correlations confirmed, raw telemetry preserved, analyst reviewed, clean baseline.

integrity.hash_method: SHA-256 of canonical JSON (sort_keys=True, default=str) excluding the integrity block itself
